title: Total RNA Isolation from Oyster Tissue Using RNAzol RT
author: Sam White

materials: Wear clean gloves and change gloves frequently.
5. Wear clean gloves and change gloves frequently.

steps.title: Read the SOPs for each of...
steps.instruction: Read the SOPs for each of the reagents used in this protocol.

steps.title: Read the manufacturer's [RNAzol RT protocol for Total RNA Isolation](https://github
steps.instruction: Read the manufacturer's [RNAzol RT protocol for Total RNA Isolation](https://github.com/sr320/LabDocs/blob/master/protocols/Commercial_Protocols/MRC_RNAzol-RT-May-2014.pdf).

steps.title: Aliquot 500uL of RNAzol RT to...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 500uL of RNAzol RT to pestle tubes and store on ice.

steps.title: Transfer tissue to pestle tubes containing RNAzol RT
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue to pestle tubes containing RNAzol RT.

steps.title: Immediately add additional 500uL of RNAzol RT to pestle tube
steps.instruction: Immediately add additional 500uL of RNAzol RT to pestle tube.

steps.title: Add 400uL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 400uL of 0.1% DEPC-treated H2O.

steps.title: Vortex 15s
steps.instruction: Vortex 15s.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature (RT) for 15mins
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature (RT) for 15mins.

steps.title: Centrifuge 12,000g for 15mins @ RT
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 12,000g for 15mins @ RT.

steps.title: Transfer 750uL of supernatant (do not...
steps.instruction: Transfer 750uL of supernatant (do not disturb pellet) to sterile 1.7mL snap-cap tube. (Discard remaining liquid in RNAzol RT Hazardous Waste container in fume hood. Leave old tube open in fume hood over night and then discard in regular trash.)

steps.title: Add 1 volume of isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of isopropanol.

steps.title: Vortex 5s
steps.instruction: Vortex 5s.

steps.title: Incubate @ RT for 15mins
steps.instruction: Incubate @ RT for 15mins.

steps.title: Centrifuge 12,000g for 10mins @ RT
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 12,000g for 10mins @ RT.20. Discard supernatant; do not disturb pellet.

steps.title: Add 400uL of 75% ethanol, centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Add 400uL of 75% ethanol, centrifuge 4,000g for 3mins @ RT.
